name: Vegan "Eggnog
recipeIngredient: 2 packages soft, silken tofu (1/2 oz each)
16 ounces vanilla soymilk or rice milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except nutmeg in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend thoroughly, stopping occasionally to scrape down the sides of the bowl.
3. Serve well-chilled and dust with nutmeg.
Makes 8 servings.
